title: Do You Need Insurance Yet?
scenario: Your employer gives a thin group health cover. An agent suggests your own ₹5 lakh health policy for a small monthly premium. You're young and healthy. Buy your own cover?

choices.label: Skip it — the office cover is enough
choices.lesson: Employer cover vanishes the day you switch or lose a job, and is often thin. Relying on it alone leaves a gap exactly when you may need it.

choices.label: Buy a ₹5L personal health policy
choices.lesson: Insurance is bought before you need it, not after. One hospital bill can wipe out years of savings, so protection comes before growth.
